summary: Backend-only testing of Stock Tracker API. All 9 pytest cases passed (100% success rate) covering exchange-rate (USD->MXN via Frankfurter), watchlist CRUD with default seeding, quotes (list + single via yfinance), 30-day history, and AI prediction (Gemini-3-flash-preview via Emergent LLM with news). MongoDB _id never leaks into responses. Watchlist left in default state with 12 tickers.

minor.issue: Validates ticker by calling fetch_quote which has multi-second latency; could slow add-flow on first request, but functional.
No rate-limit / caching of LLM responses by ticker per session-hour beyond storing in mongo; repeated calls re-incur LLM cost. Predictions are persisted but never reused.
Silently skips failed tickers (logs warning). Frontend has no signal which tickers failed.

action_items: Consider caching prediction responses for ~1 hour per ticker to reduce LLM cost (already keyed by hour in session_id but not reused).
Optionally surface skipped tickers in /api/quotes response so the UI can display partial-fetch warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~400 lines and mixes routes, helpers, and LLM logic; acceptable for MVP but should be split into routers/services if it grows.

POST /api/watchlist re-fetches the quote synchronously to validate the ticker; on slow yfinance responses this can take several seconds. Consider a lightweight validity check (yf.Ticker(t).fast_info) instead of full fetch_quote.
_exchange_cache is module-global and not concurrency-safe but acceptable here since asyncio is single-threaded.
Prediction endpoint stores result in Mongo but never reads it back — caching layer not wired.
All endpoints correctly project away `_id` (.find({}, {'_id': 0})) — good.
Pydantic models used and response shapes validated — good.
seed_data_creation: Default watchlist of 12 tickers is auto-seeded by the backend on first /api/watchlist call. Tests transiently add/remove AAPL and leave watchlist in default state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. backend_test.py covers: exchange-rate, watchlist seed/add/remove/invalid/delete-nonexistent, quotes list, single quote NVDA, 30d history, and AI prediction (90s timeout). Tests are idempotent; AAPL is cleaned up. Public URL from frontend/.env REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is set. If retesting prediction, expect 5-15s latency.
